# Purpose
The content is a copyright and licensing notice for a software codebase. It specifies that the original code was written by Patrick Powell in 1995 and can be used for any purpose, provided the notice remains intact in all source code distributions. Holger Weiss maintains the current version of the code, and his modifications can be used, modified, and redistributed freely. While it is encouraged to send back any additions or fixes to Holger Weiss for inclusion in the official version, it is not a requirement for using or redistributing modified versions of the code. The notice also clarifies that keeping the notice intact is not mandatory for redistribution.
